elements.title: lang::report_page_044_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_c.id,
       kbi_c.fullname                                                          AS course,
       kbi_c.shortname,
       kbi_c.timecreated                                                       AS created,
       kbi_c.idnumber,
       kbi_c.enablecompletion,
       kbi_c.visible,
       MAX(kbi_e.grade)                                                        AS grade,
       MAX(l.timespend)                                                    AS timespend,
       MAX(l.visits)                                                       AS visits,
       MAX(kbi_e.completed)                                                    AS completed,
       MAX(kbi_e.learners)                                                     AS learners,
       (SELECT COUNT(id) FROM mdl_course_modules WHERE course = kbi_c.id
                                                   AND deletioninprogress = 0
                                                   AND visible = 1)        AS modules,
       MAX(kbi_cat.name)                                                       AS category,
       (SELECT name FROM mdl_course_categories WHERE id = MAX(kbi_cat.parent)) AS parent_category,
       MAX(t.teachers)                                                     AS teachers,
       MAX(t.teachers_count)                                               AS teachers_count,
       MAX(t.teachers_timespend)                                           AS teachers_timespend,
       MAX(s.avg_learners_timespend)                                       AS avg_learners_timespend
FROM mdl_course kbi_c
       JOIN (SELECT kbi_e.courseid,
                    ROUND(AVG(CASE
                                WHEN kbi_g.rawgrademax > 0 THEN (kbi_g.finalgrade / kbi_g.rawgrademax) * 100
                                ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END), 0) AS grade,
                    COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_cc.userid)              AS completed,
                    COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_ue.userid)              AS learners
             FROM mdl_enrol kbi_e
                    JOIN mdl_user_enrolments kbi_ue ON kbi_ue.enrolid = kbi_e.id
                    JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.instanceid = kbi_e.courseid AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
                    JOIN mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra ON kbi_ra.contextid = kbi_ctx.id AND kbi_ra.userid = kbi_ue.userid
                    LEFT JOIN mdl_course_completions kbi_cc
                      ON kbi_cc.timecompleted > 0 AND kbi_cc.course = kbi_e.courseid AND kbi_cc.userid = kbi_ue.userid
                    JOIN mdl_grade_items kbi_gi ON kbi_gi.itemtype = 'course' AND kbi_gi.courseid = kbi_e.courseid
                    LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_grades kbi_g
                      ON kbi_g.userid = kbi_ue.userid AND kbi_g.itemid = kbi_gi.id AND kbi_g.finalgrade IS NOT NULL
             WHERE kbi_e.courseid > 0
               AND kbi_e.courseid = :courseid
               AND kbi_ue.status = 0
               AND kbi_e.status = 0
               AND kbi_ra.roleid = 5
             GROUP BY kbi_e.courseid) e ON kbi_e.courseid = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT courseid, SUM(timespend) AS timespend, SUM(visits) AS visits
                  FROM (SELECT kbi_ctx.instanceid, kbi_ra.userid
                        FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
                               JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid
                        WHERE kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
                          AND kbi_ctx.instanceid = :courseid
                        GROUP BY kbi_ctx.instanceid, kbi_ra.userid) cu
                         LEFT JOIN mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking kbi_ltu
                           ON kbi_ltu.courseid = cu.instanceid AND kbi_ltu.userid = cu.userid
                  WHERE cu.instanceid > 0
                  GROUP BY kbi_ltu.courseid) l ON l.courseid = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_categories kbi_cat ON kbi_cat.id = kbi_c.category
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT ct.instanceid,
                         GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(kbi_u.firstname, ' ', kbi_u.lastname) SEPARATOR ', ') AS teachers,
                         COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_u.id)                                                       AS teachers_count,
                         SUM(timespend)                                                             AS teachers_timespend
                  FROM (SELECT kbi_ctx.instanceid, kbi_ra.userid
                        FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
                               JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid
                        WHERE kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
                          AND kbi_ctx.instanceid = :courseid
                          AND kbi_ra.roleid = 3
                        GROUP BY kbi_ctx.instanceid, kbi_ra.userid) ct
                         JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON ct.userid = kbi_u.id
                         LEFT JOIN mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking kbi_lit
                           ON kbi_lit.courseid = ct.instanceid AND kbi_lit.userid = kbi_u.id
                  GROUP BY ct.instanceid) t ON t.instanceid = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT cl.instanceid, SUM(kbi_lit.timespend) / COUNT(DISTINCT(cl.userid)) AS avg_learners_timespend
                  FROM (SELECT kbi_ctx.instanceid, kbi_ra.userid
                        FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
                               JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid
                        WHERE kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
                          AND kbi_ctx.instanceid = :courseid
                          AND kbi_ra.roleid = 5
                        GROUP BY kbi_ctx.instanceid, kbi_ra.userid) cl
                         LEFT JOIN mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking kbi_lit
                           ON kbi_lit.courseid = cl.instanceid AND kbi_lit.userid = cl.userid
                  GROUP BY cl.instanceid) s ON s.instanceid = kbi_c.id
WHERE kbi_c.id > 0
  AND kbi_c.id = :courseid
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
GROUP BY kbi_c.id
